languages.text: "После тщательного обыска, я наш{mf|ел|ла} рукописный дневник с подписью Себериана фон Валанциуса".
"After a thorough search, I found a handwritten diary signed by Seberian von Valancius."
languages.original_text: "После тщательного обыска, я наш{mf|ел|ла} рукописный дневник с подписью Себериана фон Валанциуса".

traits.locale_text: "After a thorough search, I found a handwritten diary signed by Seberian von Valancius."
"After a thorough search, I found a handwritten diary signed by Seberian von Valancius."
"After a thorough search, I found a handwritten diary signed by Seberian von Valancius."

languages.text: “经过一番彻底的搜寻，我找到了一本手写日记，上面的署名是塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯。”
languages.original_text: "After a thorough search, I found a handwritten diary signed by Seberian von Valancius."

traits.locale_text: “经过一番彻底的搜寻，我找到了一本手写日记，上面的署名是塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯。”

languages.text: «Tras llevar a cabo un registro exhaustivo, he hallado un diario manuscrito firmado por Seberian von Valancius».
languages.original_text: "After a thorough search, I found a handwritten diary signed by Seberian von Valancius."

traits.locale_text: «Tras llevar a cabo un registro exhaustivo, he hallado un diario manuscrito firmado por Seberian von Valancius».

languages.text: « Après une recherche approfondie, j'ai trouvé un journal manuscrit signé par un certain Seberian von Valancius. »
languages.original_text: "After a thorough search, I found a handwritten diary signed by Seberian von Valancius."

traits.locale_text: « Après une recherche approfondie, j'ai trouvé un journal manuscrit signé par un certain Seberian von Valancius. »

languages.text: "Nach einer gründlichen Suche fand ich ein von Seberian von Valancius signiertes handschriftliches Tagebuch."
languages.original_text: "After a thorough search, I found a handwritten diary signed by Seberian von Valancius."

traits.locale_text: "Nach einer gründlichen Suche fand ich ein von Seberian von Valancius signiertes handschriftliches Tagebuch."

languages.text: "Kapsamlı bir aramanın ardından Seberian von Valancius'un imzasını taşıyan el yazması bir günlük buldum."
languages.original_text: "After a thorough search, I found a handwritten diary signed by Seberian von Valancius."

traits.locale_text: "Kapsamlı bir aramanın ardından Seberian von Valancius'un imzasını taşıyan el yazması bir günlük buldum."

languages.text: 「徹底的な捜索の末、私はシベリアンのヴァランシウスの署名が入った手書きの日記を見つけた」
languages.original_text: "After a thorough search, I found a handwritten diary signed by Seberian von Valancius."

traits.locale_text: 「徹底的な捜索の末、私はシベリアンのヴァランシウスの署名が入った手書きの日記を見つけた」
